message: Update to 1.1.1 - Fixes UPDATE NOW Windows error (cannot find '\\'). Close Nova, then click UPDATE NOW. If auto-update still fails on an older build, download the installer once from pronova.site and run it manually.
releaseNotes: 1.1.1 - Fix updater launching empty path \\. Installer downloads to %TEMP%\Project-Nova-Update-1.1.1.exe and is verified before launch. One manual install may be needed if you are stuck on a broken updater.
